TLPL783 Critical Ethnographic Research Methods (3 Credits)

This course asks: why are you the person to study and tell the story

of a community? Through critical ethnographic research methods and methodologies, students are invited to be self-reflexive and interrogate what it means to learn from, engage with, and tell stories about marginalized communities in racial/social justice research.
